name: methodology-dual-stream-research
description: Wires CAS methodology campaigns to IP's existing discovery + outreach engine: discover distributor-candidate + target-user prospects, draft a research INVITE (embedding the Connexions interview link + thin-MVP url), queue for human send-approval. Responses return via the Connexions voice loop, not IP replies. Reuses the 5-stage partners pipeline (discover/enrich/draft/send); no new external services.

env_vars.name: METHODOLOGY_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Bearer token shared with CAS; auth for /api/methodology/* routes incl. the new activate route
env_vars.where: shared secret, same value on CAS + IP Vercel

env_vars.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Brave Search for web discovery (also accepts BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY)

env_vars.name: HUNTER_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Hunter.io email enrichment for discovered prospects

env_vars.name: APOLLO_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Apollo contact enrichment (cascade before Hunter); dark-mode if absent

env_vars.name: UNIPILE_API_KEY
env_vars.description: LinkedIn discovery + DM channel (only if a campaign's channel_mix includes linkedin)

env_vars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Email send (research invites) after human approval

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Primary LLM for scoring + research-invite drafting

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
env_vars.description: App URL (OpenRouter referer; webhook notify URLs)

external_setup.title: No new external setup — reuses the live discovery + outreach engine
external_setup.description: All providers (Brave, Hunter, Apollo, Unipile, Resend, OpenRouter) are already configured for the live SDR product. This feature adds no new dashboards or webhooks. The only new wiring is internal: an activate route + a research-invite draft + a migration.
steps: Confirm the methodology Supabase migration 049 is applied (adds mvp_url + connexions_interview_url to methodology_campaigns and methodology_campaign_id to partners).
Confirm CAS passes mvp_url + connexions_interview_url when it creates/activates a campaign (CAS cards/[slug]/validate).
